step_rationale: Circulating RNA biomarker associated with ACS incidence and prognosis; mechanism not fully established.
mechanism: PELATON is a circulating RNA whose expression is dysregulated in acute coronary syndromes and may reflect either myocardial injury or vascular inflammation.

references.title: High expression of lncRNA PELATON serves as a risk factor for the incidence and prognosis of acute coronary syndrome.
